title: Analysis: Iran's Underground Military Network Sustains Operations Despite Strikes
detail: Intelligence analysis reveals that Iran's extensive underground military infrastructure continues to maintain operational capacity despite ongoing US-Israeli airstrikes. The subterranean network, built over decades, includes hardened command centers, weapons storage facilities, and manufacturing sites that have proven resilient to conventional bombing campaigns. This underground architecture represents a key factor in Iran's ability to sustain military operations and retaliation capabilities throughout the current conflict.

media.caption: Analysis of Iran's underground military infrastructure
